_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: garrysmod
author: ukdev@p1ka.eu
description: Garrys Mod, is a sandbox physics game on Source Engine by Valve.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Server Files: /mnt/server

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
# Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 4020 -beta $( [[ "${GMOD_X64}" == "1" ]] && printf %s 'x86-64' || printf %s 'public' ) validate +quit

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

cd /mnt/server/garrysmod/cfg
if [ ! -f "server.cfg" ]; then

echo '
hostname        "The Alium Community Server"
sv_password     ""
sv_loadingurl   "https://erickmaksimets.github.io/loadingscreen.github.io/"
sv_downloadurl  ""

// Steam Server List Settings
sv_location "eu"
sv_lan "0"

// Network Settings - Please keep these set to default.
sv_minrate              75000
sv_maxrate              0
gmod_physiterations     2
net_splitpacket_maxrate 45000
decalfrequency          12

// Execute Ban Files - Please do not edit
exec banned_ip.cfg
exec banned_user.cfg
' > server.cfg

fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/garrysmod/addons

variables.name: Map
variables.description: The default map for the server.

variables.name: Steam Account Token
variables.description: The Steam Account Token required for the server to be displayed publicly.

variables.name: Source AppID
variables.description: Required for game to update on server restart. Do not modify this.

variables.name: Workshop ID
variables.description: The ID of your workshop collection (the numbers at the end of the URL)

variables.name: Gamemode
variables.description: The gamemode of your server.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: The maximum amount of players allowed on your game server.

variables.name: Tickrate
variables.description: The tickrate defines how fast the server will update each entity's location.

variables.name: Lua Refresh
variables.description: If enabled will try to update server version on every startup.

variables.name: x64
variables.description: Garry's Mod branch x32/x64

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: If enabled will try to update server version on every startup.

variables.name: Git Addons
variables.description: The space-separated list of Git addons to install on the server; the format must be “https://{registry.com}/path/to/repo.git”

variables.name: Debug Level
variables.description: Set developer message level, affects on extra information for developers.

variables.name: Physics Engine
variables.description:
Select a physics engine for the game; the selected engine will be loaded when the server starts.

- https://github.com/RaphaelIT7/VPhysics-Jolt
- https://github.com/Asphaltian/VPhysics-Box3D

variables.name: Holy Library
variables.description:
A library that contains many functions and some optimizations and bug fixes for gmod.

https://github.com/RaphaelIT7/gmod-holylib

variables.name: gm_passlogpatch
variables.description:
Removes Enigne's xxxx: password failed. Console log output.

https://github.com/ncgst/gm_passlogpatch

variables.name: gmsv_tungstenite
variables.description:
🪨 websocket client for garry's mod servers!

https://github.com/shockpast/gm_tungstenite

variables.name: gm_getregistry
variables.description:
A simple Garry's Mod Lua module that exposes the debug.getregistry table to Lua.

The main goal of this module is to provide access to the Lua registry table, which contains internal Lua state and metatables.

https://github.com/wrefgtzweve/gm_getregistry

variables.name: GWSockets
variables.description:
WebSockets for GLua.

https://github.com/FredyH/GWSockets/

variables.name: HTTP Client
variables.description:
The HTTP client, which will be used additionally by the game, does not fundamentally replace the built-in one; it is used by advanced scripts.

- https://github.com/timschumi/gmod-chttp
- https://github.com/WilliamVenner/gmsv_reqwest

variables.name: gmsv_workshop
variables.description:
📩 steamworks.DownloadUGC for the server!

https://github.com/WilliamVenner/gmsv_workshop

variables.name: gmsv_async_postgres
variables.description:
Simple PostgreSQL connector module for Garry's Mod using libpq with asynchronousity in mind.

https://github.com/Pika-Software/gmsv_async_postgres

variables.name: gm_asyncio
variables.description:
Make your Garry's Mod I/O asynchronous!

https://github.com/Pika-Software/gm_asyncio

variables.name: gm_efsw
variables.description:
Entropia File System Watcher in Garry's Mod.

https://github.com/Pika-Software/gm_efsw
